parameters.query:
WITH new_source AS (
  INSERT INTO sources (tenant_id, name, source_type, status)
  VALUES ('{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.source_name }}', '{{ $json.source_type }}', 'processing')
  RETURNING id
),
new_doc AS (
  INSERT INTO documents (source_id, tenant_id, content)
  SELECT id, '{{ $json.tenant_id }}', '{{ $json.text }}' FROM new_source
  RETURNING id, source_id
)
SELECT new_doc.id AS document_id, new_doc.source_id FROM new_doc;

UPDATE sources SET status = 'completed', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Text Chunking').first().json.source_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', message: 'Dokument verarbeitet', source_id: $('Text Chunking').first().json.source_id, document_id: $('Text Chunking').first().json.document_id }) }}
